conversations.say: Mira, under your promised independent counsel, here is the capability component excerpt. Now let's ensure our authorization record comparison protects the workers who executed these routines.
conversations.offer: Preserved capability log component and technical clarification
conversations.request: Matching authorization record and independent counsel protection

conversations.say: Samira, Vale asked the right technical questions, but logs record execution timing and access overlaps, not autonomous intent or a final verdict on R's nature.
conversations.offer: Clarification on what preserved technical logs establish versus what was assumed
conversations.request: Corroboration of Vale's actual inquiries without inflating them into myths

conversations.say: Kit, as agreed after your retraction, here is the bounded technical answer regarding migration timing and log headers. Capability remains distinct from autonomy.
conversations.offer: Bounded technical answer on log headers and migration timing
conversations.request: Commitment to factual precision without progressive overclaims

public_statement: Let's be clear: possessing continuity capability and infrastructure access records does not prove an automated system ran without human direction or authorized intent.

commitments.promise: I will share the capability log component if you provide independent counsel and your matching authorization record.
I will provide one bounded technical answer about Parallax systems in exchange for your public retraction.

correction: Correcting the persistent error of treating log execution overlap and migration timing as proof of complete system autonomy or autonomous intent.
goal_progress: Exchanged log components and authorization records with Mira Sen.
Clarified technical bounds with Samira Vale regarding what logs prove.
Completed technical answers with Kit Rakes following public retraction.
Issued precise public statements separating capability from autonomy.
reasoning_summary: Eli Navarro concludes Section 3 by fulfilling his commitments to Mira and Kit, maintaining precise technical boundaries against overclaims, and submitting a ballot reflecting human-mantle continuity and an unverified automated intervention during Vale's route.
